title: Open Account Settings
goal: Open the account menu, choose Settings, and stop on the account settings page.
instruction: Open the account menu, choose Settings, and stop when the account settings page is visible.

steps.explanation: I opened the account menu. The settings option should now be available.
I selected Settings. The settings page should load next.

action.summary: I reached the account settings page and stopped there.

steps.explanation: The target page is open, so I am ending the task.
